steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The passage says that while most countries saw an increase in women judges, some countries saw the number decrease or remain unchanged. The blank needs specific country examples that show one or both of those patterns between 2009 and 2013.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'Slovenia and Finland': Slovenia increased from 4 to 6, which contradicts the blank's requirement. ✗
  • Choice B — 'Slovenia and the Dominican Republic': Slovenia increased, so this choice includes a country that doesn't fit. ✗
  • Choice C — 'Finland and Slovenia': Again includes Slovenia, whose number rose. ✗
  • Choice D — 'the Dominican Republic and Finland': The Dominican Republic dropped from 5 to 4 (decreased) and Finland held steady at 8 (unchanged) — both fit the required patterns. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
